headline: 1 Healthcare Stock to Target This Week and 2 Facing Headwinds
summary: From novel pharmaceuticals to telemedicine, most healthcare companies are on a mission to drive better patient outcomes. But speed bumps such as inventory destockings have persisted in the wake of COVID-19, limiting growth. This has capped the upside for healthcare stocks lately as the industry’s flat return over the past six months has trailed the S&P 500’s 4.2% gain.
